name: Agilent Technologies, Inc.
h1: Agilent Technologies's GCC footprint in India
lede: Agilent Technologies runs seven centers across five Indian cities. Manesar, Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Mumbai and Hyderabad, covering GBS, R&D, CoE and IT, built over 25 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Agilent Technologies office in India. We map seven, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Agilent Technologies GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Agilent Technologies runs 7 verified centers across 5 Indian cities (Manesar, Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Hyderabad), covering GBS, R&D, CoE and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Associate Vice President, IT - SAP Services & Digital Integration

about.description: Agilent Technologies's India footprint covers Manesar, Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Mumbai and Hyderabad, spanning GBS, R&D, CoE and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twenty decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Agilent Technologies operate in India?
faq.a: Agilent Technologies operates 7 active centers in India.

faq.a: Agilent Technologies's India footprint includes Manesar and 4 additional cities.

faq.a: Agilent Technologies runs GBS and 3 additional center types in India.
